case_title: ESTHER R. LERNER VS. ROLAND TSENG

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER ESTHER LERNER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 1, 2009 PER MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER LERNER, ESTHER R. AS TO RESPONDENT TSENG, ROLAND JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER LERNER, ESTHER R. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT TSENG, ROLAND $42,199.43 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $42,199.43, (JUDGMENT AFTER CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD). SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER ESTHER LERNER'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER (PRINCIPAL- $42,199.43). JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-01-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
